lastSyncedNote: After 26.7.21 release: added 'Schedule generator builds a whole season in one step' (bi-calendar-plus-fill) to the Leagues & Societies card's Season management group, and 'Step-by-step setup wizard' (bi-ui-checks) to the Tournaments card's Setup group. Conditional default tees (by handicap/gender/age) and the course photo library were offered but deferred as too granular for the homepage this round. Settings-tab overhaul, teams & flights combined screen, ghost-on-scorecard, Vegas double-birdie, and printable roster judged too niche for the homepage. Separately (pre-existing features that were missing from the homepage): added a Group chat bullet (bi-chat-dots-fill) to both the Tournaments and Leagues Scoring & leaderboards sections, put group chat in the Tournaments card subtitle (replacing 'online registration'), and moved the AI event recap up to the top of the Tournaments Scoring section (top 3 now: live leaderboard, AI recap, group chat).
